request_text: Add an optional --profile argument to spec-kitty do command so agents can specify a profile when they know it, avoiding ROUTER_AMBIGUOUS errors. The profile should be optional — when omitted, existing routing behavior is unchanged. Also update the orientation block in src/specify_cli/session_presence/content.py to hint that agents can optionally specify a profile (e.g. spec-kitty do --profile python-pedro "fix the bug") but it is not required.
